name: codecourse-desktop
description: CodeCourse desktop shell for the GitHub project learner.

scripts.desktop:pack: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b frontend && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config frontend/vite.config.ts && python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --distpath dist-backend backend/backend.spec && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/ensure-mingit.ps1 && electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:portable: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b frontend && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config frontend/vite.config.ts && python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --distpath dist-backend backend/backend.spec && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/ensure-mingit.ps1 && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.desktop:build: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b frontend && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config frontend/vite.config.ts && python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --distpath dist-backend backend/backend.spec && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/ensure-mingit.ps1 && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.frontend:build: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b frontend && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config frontend/vite.config.ts
scripts.backend:test: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=.. .venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
